hull_structure.desc: PETG thin shell 1.2mm wall — print as open shell sections
hull_structure.notes: Print 6 sections. Insert cable-route straws before assembly.

hull_structure.desc: X-30 expanding PU foam 2 lb/ft³ (0.032 g/cm³) — pour into shell voids
hull_structure.notes: 2-part, 2-min pot life, 4× expansion. Net foam vol 1309 cm³ after 18% internals deduction.
3mm CF plate keel + 2mm ring frames at 5 stations
Insert before foam pour. Routes: CAN, RS-485, 1553, ETH×2, power

hull_structure.desc: EPS blue foam board 25mm × 300mm × 150mm — void former material
hull_structure.notes: Owens Corning Foamular 150 or equivalent. Cut to 6 void-former shapes per build guide step 22.

hull_structure.desc: Johnson's Paste Wax 16oz tin — void-former release agent
hull_structure.notes: Consumed, not airborne weight. Apply 2 coats to all EPS void-former surfaces before foam pour.

hull_structure.desc: PTFE tube 5mm OD × 3mm ID × 2.5m — cable conduit through foam
hull_structure.notes: 6 conduits: CAN, RS-485, 1553, ETH-A, ETH-B, PWR. Install before foam pour. Total 12g stays in airframe.

hull_structure.desc: Access panel frame set — PETG 100% infill, 2mm wall — 6 frames + 6 lids
hull_structure.notes: Print from access_panel_frames.stl (TBD). Bond frames into hull with 5-min epoxy before foam pour. Lids are removable.

hull_structure.desc: M2.5×6 SS button-head Phillips — access panel screws
hull_structure.notes: 4 per panel for panels B and E. Panels A and F use bayonet. Panel C uses hinge. Panel D uses magnets.

hull_structure.desc: N42 neodymium disc magnet 6×2mm — panel D magnetic closure
hull_structure.notes: 4 in panel frame + 4 in panel lid. Press-fit into 6.1mm printed pockets.
Line all panel frame lips before foam pour. Provides dust/moisture seal and prevents foam intrusion into void.
Consumed during build. Bond access-panel frames into hull sections before foam pour step.

propulsion.notes: Mounted in engine bell section 83-100% station. Variable-area nozzle (BamJr remix CC BY 4.0)

propulsion.desc: 50A BLHeli32 ESC for 80mm nacelle EDF — 6S rated
25A BLHeli32 ESC for 40mm fuselage EDF — 4S rated
propulsion.notes: Separate 4S feed from PDB (regulates down from 6S main)

nacelle_hardware.desc: Nacelle pod shell PETG — 80mm ID, 93.5mm OD, 144mm long
Nacelle tip cap PORT — RED WS2812C nav light recess
Nacelle tip cap STBD — GREEN WS2812C nav light recess
CF stub arm 12mm OD 1.5mm wall 10.4mm long
MG90S nacelle tilt servo — 120° bracket modification
nacelle_hardware.notes: 50Hz PWM. Travel extended to 120° via bracket geometry: 0°=VTOL, 90°=fwd flight, 120°=reverse thrust (30° past horizontal). MG90S physical range supports this; bracket hard-stop at 120°. FC soft-limits: 0–90° normal mode, 90–115° reverse/brake mode.

nacelle_hardware.desc: Gear nozzle assembly — sector gear + ring + 8 flaps (BamJr CC BY 4.0)
nacelle_hardware.notes: 2 nacelle + 1 fuselage. Sector gear drives ring via bevel chain.

avionics_nodes.desc: Raspberry Pi CM4 Lite (no eMMC, no SDRAM on module)
avionics_nodes.notes: 4 units — one per node. CARRIER-2 board provides microSD boot.
CPLD write-blocker, microSD OS slot, microSD log slot, USB-C, 40-pin GPIO
XIAO RP2350, ICM-42688, BMP388, W5500 ETH, MCP2518FD CAN FD, HI-6130 1553, ISO* isolation
KSZ8895 5-port ETH switch, SiK 915MHz, HI-6130 1553 RT, CAN FD, RS-485, TPM

avionics_nodes.desc: MICROHAT PCB 42×36mm — Node 2-4 minimal comms hat
avionics_nodes.notes: Ethernet passthrough, CAN FD, RS-485, 1553 connectors only — no radio

wiring.desc: Power distribution board — XT90 main + 3× ESC outputs + 5V BEC bus
Ethernet 6-pin JST-GH 200mm cables — Murex switch to nodes
PWR + I2C + misc short cables, connectors, zip ties

payload_system.desc: SG90 payload release / winch control servo
payload_system.notes: Controls winch motor direction and brake via DRV8833

payload_system.desc: SG90 clamshell cargo door actuator servo
payload_system.notes: Drives push-pull bell-crank that opens/closes both clamshell door halves simultaneously. Spring-assist opening, servo pull-close.

payload_system.desc: N20 6V DC winch motor — 300:1 gear ratio
payload_system.notes: 300:1 gearing gives ~8N lift capacity for 250g cargo + cradle mass. Spool holds 1.5m of 0.5mm Dyneema SK75 line.

payload_system.desc: Cargo bay gondola shell PETG — 112×85×22mm belly pod
payload_system.notes: Replaces flat belly panel. Interior 101.6×76.2×76.2mm (4"×3"×3"). Belly pod protrudes 18mm below hull line — screen-accurate Serenity cargo module profile. Bonds to hull sections B and C with 5-min epoxy.

payload_system.desc: Clamshell cargo door halves PETG — 2× mirrored halves
payload_system.notes: Each half hinges on 3mm CF pin at gondola centreline. Spring-loaded to open; SG90 linkage closes and latches. Seal lip with 1.5mm closed-cell foam tape.

payload_system.desc: Cargo cradle + auto-latch PETG — accepts 4"×3"×3" box
payload_system.notes: Suspended on Dyneema line from winch. Spring-loaded corner clips auto-latch around box when cradle reaches top of bay. Unlatches when cradle descends 5mm (gravity + detent). Two-axis levelling rods keep load stable during winch traverse.
Break strength 80N. Attach to cradle eyelet with double-bowline. Wind 1.5m onto spool, reserve 0.5m slack.

obstacle_avoidance.desc: ST VL53L5CX 8×8 multizone ToF sensor — 65° FoV, 0.4–4m
obstacle_avoidance.notes: 6 sensors: S1-Forward (sta 25mm nose), S2-Aft (sta 440mm engine bell ring), S3-Port (sta 200mm hull side), S4-Stbd (sta 200mm hull side mirror), S5-Zenith (sta 180mm dorsal keel apex), S6-Nadir (sta 160mm forward belly). Each flush-mounted behind 5mm PMMA optical window. Package 6.4×3.0×1.5mm. I2C default 0x52; unique addresses assigned at boot via XSHUT multiplexing.

obstacle_avoidance.desc: TCA9548A 8-channel I2C mux — routes 6 VL53L5CX sensors
obstacle_avoidance.notes: I2C address 0x70. Select channel 0–5 to address each sensor. On shared 25×20mm PETG-mounted PCB with MCP23008.

obstacle_avoidance.desc: MCP23008 8-port I2C GPIO expander — XSHUT control
obstacle_avoidance.notes: I2C address 0x20. GP0–GP5 drive XSHUT lines. At boot: all low (sensors shutdown) → enable one at a time, assign address, disable. Shared PCB with TCA9548A. Connected to Node 3 I2C bus (Panel D access).

Press-fit into 6.5mm hull cutout. Sensor seats on 0.3mm shoulder. 0.5mm PMMA disc (cut from 1.5mm clear acrylic sheet) glued over aperture with UV cure adhesive. Mounts look like small hull portholes — screen-accurate Serenity detail.
GND/VCC/SDA/SCL. Route through foam conduit where possible; otherwise cable-clip to hull ribs. All 6 terminate at TCA9548A/MCP23008 PCB in Panel D bay.

radios_sensors.desc: u-blox M10Q GPS module + patch antenna

fasteners_misc.desc: 3M double-sided foam tape — vibration isolation mounts

cargo_bay.gondola_note: 18mm belly pod protrusion below hull line — matches Serenity cargo module profile
cargo_bay.door_type: clamshell (2 halves fold down, SG90-actuated bell-crank)
cargo_bay.cradle_type: auto-latch PETG corner clips — no manual attachment needed

nacelle_tilt.servo: MG90S (unchanged) — bracket geometry modified for 120° travel
nacelle_tilt.lift_at_115deg: nacelle thrust × cos(25°) × 2 = 1700 × 0.906 × 2 = 3080g lift — sufficient for hover with reduced payload

positions.S3_port: station 200mm — port hull side at waterline, 270° azimuth
positions.S4_stbd: station 200mm — stbd hull side at waterline, 90° azimuth

obstacle_avoidance_notes.aperture: 5mm PMMA disc flush-mount — looks like hull porthole

total_auw_g.note: EPS void formers and wax consumed during build. +59g vs Rev H base for: cargo gondola (+14g), door servo (+9g), cargo cradle (+10g), ToF sensors (+15g), I2C mux PCB (+4g), sensor mounts (+7g).
total_auw_g.note_cargo: Use 6S 1800mAh (180g) for T/W≈2.0 on cargo missions. 2800mAh gives T/W 1.87 — acceptable for slow indoor cargo ops where max throttle is rarely needed.

build_notes.void_former_material: 25mm EPS blue foam board, waxed with Johnson's Paste Wax
